# `nise bootstrap packages`

- **Usage**: `nise bootstrap packages <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs)

Manage bootstrap system packages from `[bootstrap.packages]`

## Subcommands

- [`nise bootstrap packages apply [FLAGS] [PACKAGE]…`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/apply.md)
- [`nise bootstrap packages brew <SUBCOMMAND>`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/brew.md)
- [`nise bootstrap packages import [FLAGS]`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/import.md)
- [`nise bootstrap packages prune [FLAGS]`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/prune.md)
- [`nise bootstrap packages status [-J --json] [--missing]`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/status.md)
- [`nise bootstrap packages upgrade [FLAGS] [PACKAGE]…`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/upgrade.md)
- [`nise bootstrap packages use [FLAGS] <PACKAGE>…`](/cli/bootstrap/packages/use.md)
